ingredients: 1 kg soaked baccalà (salt cod), boned and cut into pieces
steps: Lightly dredge baccalà pieces in flour and brown briefly in a pan with olive oil; remove and keep warm.
Gently saute chopped onion in olive oil. Add baccalà pieces, keeping them intact.
Mix garlic, anchovies and parsley; combine with breadcrumbs and Parmigiano and sprinkle over the fish.
Add about 1 cup water, then cook uncovered on very low heat 45 to 60 minutes, adding a little water if it dries out.
Check and adjust salt near the end. Serve with polenta.
tips: Cook very gently so the fish doesn't break; salt cod can vary, so season only near the end.
